title: Nebula Analytics
summary: Real-time data dashboard with predictive AI and a custom signal-based query layer.
detail: Nebula Analytics is a reference case study tile. In production this block would summarize discovery, architecture trade-offs, performance budgets, and rollout metrics. The in-card gallery demonstrates multiple root-relative screenshots while keeping the outer projects carousel on a single viewport at desktop widths.
